puflib-like-rtc-slow.helper_integrity: hash preservation and gross-corruption rejection only; no cryptographic tamper-safety without an external expected hash, signature, or secret MAC

esp32-puflib-native.source_region: RTC_FAST plus deep-sleep DATA SRAM capture path
esp32-puflib-native.helper_bundle_policy: lab-only raw NVS blob bundle; keep outside the repository

runtime_status.arduino: requires C or ESP-IDF integration before executable
runtime_status.micropython: requires custom MicroPython C module or custom firmware before executable
